title:
This blueprint was built off of the Movable Platform Blueprint created by drb1992, and adapted to use a curve asset for smooth movement.

The original BP can be found here - drbforums.unrealengine.com/community/community-content-tools-and-tutorials/65463-free-moving-platform-blueprint
